research_question: Does monthly variance-managed exposure to the same high-liquidity 30-stock basket improve net outcomes versus full exposure?
null_hypothesis: Mean monthly net active return of variance-managed exposure versus the same fully exposed basket is not positive.

sources: Moreira and Muir 2017, Journal of Finance, DOI 10.1111/jofi.12513
Cederburg et al. 2020, Journal of Financial Economics, DOI 10.1016/j.jfineco.2020.04.015
economic_prior.distinction: Time-series variance management of a basket fixed within each decision/holding interval and identical for managed/comparator; it may change only at scheduled monthly top-30 rebalance and is not cross-sectional low-volatility selection or ETF inverse-volatility allocation.
economic_prior.limitation: The baseline/current windows and capped exposure are preregistered design choices, not a literal replication or causal claim.

universe.decision_date: last accepted session of each calendar month
universe.minimum_listing_history: 274 accepted sessions before and including decision date
universe.selection_identity: full accepted non-synthetic hashed qfq_close identity for all 274 sessions plus exact 20-row amount formation identity
universe.ranking: median 20-session amount descending, then opaque ts_code ascending

allowed_before_ranking: ts_code fails the frozen exchange-aware ordinary-A regex or board is not Main, ChiNext, or STAR
list_date is missing, malformed, or later than the decision date
fewer than 274 accepted sessions exist from list_date through the decision date
the 274-session row identity has a duplicate key, wrong snapshot, non-accepted quality, synthetic row, or invalid row_hash
the consecutive 274-session qfq_close window is incomplete, nonfinite, or nonpositive
the consecutive 20-session amount window is incomplete, nonfinite, or negative
forbidden_additional_filters: future listing, delisting, or security-status filters
quality filters beyond the frozen snapshot and row-identity checks

mechanism.observation_grid: all 274 closes and the last 20 amounts use the same consecutive accepted-session grid ending at the decision close
mechanism.basket_daily_return: equal mean of simple qfq_close returns across the same 30 stocks; estimation index only, not realized portfolio performance
mechanism.baseline_variance: mean(r^2) over first 252 basket daily returns
mechanism.current_variance: mean(r^2) over last 21 basket daily returns
mechanism.window_partition: the 273 returns are exhausted by non-overlapping first-252 and last-21 windows
mechanism.invalid_variance: zero or nonfinite baseline/current variance fails closed

historical_return_representation.holding_period_prices: qfq_open from the next accepted session after the decision through the next scheduled rebalance accepted-session open
historical_return_representation.stock_return_proxy: next scheduled rebalance qfq_open divided by current entry qfq_open minus one
historical_return_representation.targets: managed target is exposure/30 per selected stock and comparator target is 1/30 per selected stock
historical_return_representation.pretrade_proxy_weight: the prior target stock weights drifted only by the frozen qfq_open proxy returns through the current rebalance open and renormalized with cash
historical_return_representation.turnover: sum(abs(target_stock_weight-pretrade_proxy_stock_weight)) across the union of old and new stock baskets
historical_return_representation.cost: 0.005 times turnover; first entry from cash and terminal split liquidation to cash are included
historical_return_representation.corporate_action_handling: no separate dividend or corporate-action cash flow is added because qfq prices are the sole secondary economic proxy
historical_return_representation.capacity_limit_status_use: aggregate feasibility and execution-stress diagnostics only; they do not alter proxy returns, fills, targets, or weights

splits.retrospective_holdout: 2024-01-01..2026-06-30 opened only after accepted validation pass
splits.cross_boundary_rule: purge intervals whose entry and exit do not remain in one split

validation_inference.alpha_policy: fixed conservative project-level ceiling; validation and conditional holdout each preassigned 1/60 without recycling and both must pass; not claimed as controller allocation
validation_inference.active_return: managed monthly net return minus comparator monthly net return
validation_inference.annualized_volatility: sample standard deviation with ddof=1 times sqrt(12)
validation_inference.bootstrap: PCG64 circular blocks of length 3; draw ceil(N/3) starts, wrap, concatenate and truncate to N
validation_inference.lower_bound: observed mean minus linearly interpolated (1-alpha) quantile of centered bootstrap means

strict_gates: exact retained interval count, exactly 30 selected stocks per interval and zero invalid intervals
mean monthly net active return is positive
one-sided centered bootstrap p-value is at most 1/60
centered bootstrap lower confidence bound is positive
managed annualized volatility is lower than comparator annualized volatility
managed annualized net return is positive
